raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX XXXX transactions where made in XXXX to a XXXX for {$770.00} each totaling {$1500.00}. Citi notified through text on XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX. message reads " free tractor supply citi fraud Msg : Card **** XXXX have been compromised. It will close on XXXX and a new card will be sent. To close now, rely XXXX or call XXXX. Rely STOP to Opt-Out ''. I immediately logged into my account to see that yes there where XXXX charges made. Called citi from the XXXX XXXX department said they would open a case it would take XXXX days. 15 days later I get a call for no payment " past due '' I explain it was being investigated. Their fraud dept informed me that they never opened up a fraud claim but see where they issued me a new card. Now I'm XXXX the open the fraud complaint I asked for a case number " XXXX '' fraud support explained they would note my account and to not make payments since it was being investigated. Never noted account, I keep receiving calls from citi to collect, I explain that its being investigated. They send me too their fraud dept I give them my case number I get " yes we're still investigating we will note the account '' THEY NEVER NOTE THE ACCOUNT! my credit is going down the toilet while they figure it out 2 months later. Also I live in Florida never been to California and I can't seem to find a business named " XXXX XXXX ''.
